verdict: Professional hydradermabrasion system paired with specialized serums containing hydrating and peptide-based ingredients. Combines mechanical exfoliation with potent active ingredients for clinical results.

_research.name: Dr. Dennis Gross HydraFacial MD System
pros: Combines multiple modalities: exfoliation, extraction, infusion
_research.con: Expensive consumable costs for specialty serums significantly increase total cost of ownership.
